# Third-party browser assets

## AntV G6 5.1.1

- Project: <https://github.com/antvis/G6>
- Asset: `g6-5.1.1.min.js`
- License: MIT (`antv-g6-LICENSE.txt`)
- Purpose: offline graph rendering, layout, camera controls, and minimap for
  `mneme serve`

The browser asset is pinned and shipped inside the Mneme skill archive. Mneme
does not load it from a CDN and does not install npm packages at runtime.
